summary: Backend testing complete for pdfplumber PDF extraction. All 18 tests passed. Successfully verified: POST /api/extract-pdf-async (returns task_id), GET /api/extract-task/{task_id} (returns complete status with 81 programs + 74 SCI lease), GET /api/programs returns 81 programs, GET /api/sci/lease-rates returns 74 vehicles. All specific vehicle data tests passed including Fiat 500e BEV 2025 ($5000 bonus_cash, $6000 consumer_cash), Ram 1500 Laramie DT6P98 2026 (consumer_cash=0, option1_rates all null), Dodge Durango SRT Hellcat 2026 ($15,500 consumer_cash), Jeep Compass Limited 2026 (no option1_rates, has option2_rates).
